tdd-generator.description: Generates failing test suites (RED phase) following TDD methodology for NestJS/DDD projects. Specializes in Jest unit tests, e2e tests with Supertest, and integration tests with real DBs.

publish.description: Publica cambios a GitHub con validaciones previas (lint + tests + build)
